meaning: n.博比(Bob 的异体,Barbara,Roberta 的昵称 亦作Bobby)(m. & f.)
examples: Since her chemotherapy for ovarian cancer, Bobbie lost most of her hair, but more damaging, she has severe neuropathy in her left hand and both feet.
Gene and Bobbie Bonti have been married for 68 years.
Gene Bonti helps his wife Bobbie down steps into the couple's family room.
On Wednesday two journalists, Bobbie Johnson and Jim Giles, set out on an unlikely mission.
The Knights will face a Rochdale side without a coach after Bobbie Goulding was sacked on Thursday.
